name: otterwise
description: Autonomous compound research platform — spawns agent teams to analyze datasets with a graph of discoveries

skills.name: research
skills.description: Start a new Otterwise research session on a dataset

skills.name: continue
skills.description: Continue and expand an existing Otterwise research session

skills.name: status
skills.description: Show the current state of Otterwise research

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: Run autonomous infinite research on a dataset

skills.name: autopilot-pause
skills.description: Pause or resume a running autopilot session

skills.name: dashboard
skills.description: Launch or stop the research graph visualization dashboard
